title: Xtra Roasted Jamaican Frankfurter Bowl
description: A roasted and fluffy meal prep Jamaican dish featuring frankfurter and ferment kimchi, diabetic friendly and served in a bento box.

ingredients.name: Roasted Vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the frankfurter with Jamaican jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper until well coated.
Place the coated frankfurter on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 15 minutes.
In a separate bowl, toss the roasted vegetables with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until well coated.
Spread the vegetables on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and roast for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the ferment kimchi with chopped scallions.
To assemble the bowls, divide the cooked brown rice into 4 bento boxes, then top with roasted frankfurter, roasted vegetables, and a spoonful of kimchi mixture.
Serve immediately and refrigerate or freeze for later meal prep.
Reheat the bowls in the microwave or oven until the ingredients are warmed through.
